allow: Bash(python -c "from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright; p = sync_playwright\(\).start\(\); b = p.chromium.launch\(headless=True\); page = b.new_page\(\); page.goto\('http://localhost:5173/open-pioneer-trails-weather-app/', timeout=10000\); print\('OK:', page.title\(\)\); b.close\(\); p.stop\(\)")
